description_long: This is a large, rectangular metal shipping container, commonly used for storage or transportation of goods. The exterior is painted a dark green color and features corrugated metal sides for structural strength. One end of the container is equipped with reinforced double doors, secured by multiple vertical locking bars and hinges, which are typical for secure access. The other sides are solid panels with no visible openings or windows. The container stands on four small corner supports, slightly elevating it from the ground. Its robust construction and industrial design make it suitable for placement in urban environments such as shipping yards, construction sites, or industrial storage areas.
description: A large, dark green metal shipping container with corrugated sides and reinforced double doors on one end, designed for secure storage or transport.
description_view_0: The long side of the container is visible, showing corrugated metal panels and a solid, uninterrupted surface.
description_view_1: The short, solid end of the container is shown, with no visible doors or features.
description_view_2: Another long side view, nearly identical to view 0, with corrugated metal and no openings.
description_view_3: The end with reinforced double doors, locking bars, and hinges is visible, indicating the main access point.
attribute_handles_or_grips: vertical locking bars with integrated handles on door end
